'''famugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:praelector|praelector]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praelector|praelector]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| famugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæmigith|fæmigith]] || [[word:fæmigij|fæmigij]] || [[word:fæmigish|fæmigish]] || [[word:fæmigi|fæmigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:famumuguth|famumuguth]] || [[word:famumuguj|famumuguj]] || [[word:famumugush|famumugush]] || [[word:famumugu|famumugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:famuguth|famuguth]] || [[word:famuguj|famuguj]] || [[word:famugush|famugush]] || [[word:famugu|famugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:famufguth|famufguth]] || [[word:famufguj|famufguj]] || [[word:famufgush|famufgush]] || [[word:famufguf|famufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:famuguthu|famuguthu]] || [[word:famuguju|famuguju]] || [[word:famugushu|famugushu]] || [[word:famuguku|famuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:famuguth|famuguth]] || [[word:famuguj|famuguj]] || [[word:famugush|famugush]] || [[word:famugu|famugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:famuguthul|famuguthul]] || [[word:famugujul|famugujul]] || [[word:famugushul|famugushul]] || [[word:famugukul|famugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:famuguthuthu|famuguthuthu]] || [[word:famugujuju|famugujuju]] || [[word:famugushushu|famugushushu]] || [[word:famuguku|famuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:famuguthun|famuguthun]] || [[word:famugujun|famugujun]] || [[word:famugushun|famugushun]] || [[word:famugukun|famugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:famuguthuoro|famuguthuoro]] || [[word:famugujuoro|famugujuoro]] || [[word:famugushuoro|famugushuoro]] || [[word:famugukuoro|famugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
